audit_result.proof_trace: The Fulu spec mandates returning Electra blob limit (9) when no BlobSchedule entry matches, regardless of epoch. Current code returns epoch-dependent fallback (6 for Deneb-era, 9 for Electra-era), violating spec. Since Fulu is not yet activated (FuluForkEpoch=MaxUint64), no immediate consensus risk, but must be fixed before Fulu fork.
audit_result.attack_scenario: If Fulu activates without updating this logic, nodes querying epochs with no BlobSchedule match would enforce incorrect blob limits for pre-Electra historical epochs, potentially causing consensus splits during sync or validation.

PROP-56ad1eb2-inv-015.text: get_blob_parameters must return Electra defaults when no BLOB_SCHEDULE entry matches.
PROP-56ad1eb2-inv-015.assertion: forall epoch e where no schedule match: get_blob_parameters(e)==BlobParameters(ELECTRA_FORK_EPOCH, MAX_BLOBS_ELECTRA)
